protocol_levels.name: Read only
data_sources: any public page or API endpoint

protocol_levels.name: Reference verification
protocol_levels.method: check at least one reference path beyond ordinary page reading

protocol_levels.name: Hash verification
protocol_levels.method: compute hashes locally and compare with declared hashes
allowed_claims: hash match confirmed for specific artifacts
forbidden_claims: direct Arweave verification unless Arweave data was extracted
Ethereum witness verified unless ETH transaction/input checked

protocol_levels.name: Script-audited local verification
protocol_levels.method: review and run official verification scripts locally
forbidden_claims: direct chain verification unless separately performed

protocol_levels.name: Independent digital reproduction
protocol_levels.method: use independent tools to reproduce verification results
forbidden_claims: full public digital verification unless all public components covered

protocol_levels.name: Full public digital verification
protocol_levels.method: verify all required public digital targets

protocol_levels.name: Remote physical witness
protocol_levels.method: live remote video session with nonce/challenge

protocol_levels.name: Onsite physical witness
protocol_levels.method: onsite observation with touch/handling and custody log
forbidden_claims: final forensic identity unless P7/P8/P9 achieved

protocol_levels.name: Forensic physical attestation
protocol_levels.method: tool-assisted flaw analysis with signed report
forbidden_claims: public disclosure of confidential flaw data unless authorized

bitcoin_originals.name: API / manifest read
allowed_claims: inscription IDs and TXIDs read from manifest

bitcoin_originals.name: Explorer reference check
bitcoin_originals.method: check inscription IDs, TXIDs, address on explorer

bitcoin_originals.name: SPV / Merkle proof verification
bitcoin_originals.method: verify inclusion via SPV or Merkle proof

bitcoin_originals.name: Local Bitcoin node verification
bitcoin_originals.method: query local node for transaction and block data

bitcoin_originals.name: Ordinals witness extraction
bitcoin_originals.method: extract inscription witness bytes from transaction

bitcoin_originals.name: Multi-party Bitcoin attestation
bitcoin_originals.method: multiple parties independently verify Bitcoin data

digital_mirrors.name: GitHub mirror existence
digital_mirrors.method: confirm mirror file exists in repository

digital_mirrors.name: GitHub mirror hash match
digital_mirrors.method: download from GitHub, compute SHA-256, compare with declared hash
allowed_claims: GitHub mirror + SHA-256 hash match confirmed
digital_mirrors.notes: GitHub mirror + SHA-256 hash match is valid but limited.

digital_mirrors.name: External pointer existence
digital_mirrors.method: verify existence of external pointers via explorer or gateway

digital_mirrors.name: Cross-mirror consistency
digital_mirrors.method: compare hashes across at least two independent channels

digital_mirrors.name: Full public digital data verification
digital_mirrors.method: verify all required public digital targets

digital_mirrors.name: Independent full digital reproduction
digital_mirrors.method: reproduce full digital verification using independent tools

digital_mirrors.name: Multi-party digital attestation
digital_mirrors.method: multiple parties independently verify digital data

time_anchors.name: ETH / Arweave time check
time_anchors.method: check ETH or Arweave transaction timestamps

time_anchors.name: Bitcoin block time check
time_anchors.method: verify Bitcoin block timestamps for inscription transactions

time_anchors.name: Cross-anchor consistency
time_anchors.method: compare timestamps across multiple independent anchors

time_anchors.name: Multi-party time audit
time_anchors.method: multiple parties independently audit time anchors

time_anchors.name: Public celestial time-window solving
time_anchors.method: solve celestial positions from public image/video evidence using astronomical ephemeris
forbidden_claims: T8 claim from public data alone
requires: capture direction / camera orientation if available
astronomical ephemeris solver or equivalent calculation

time_anchors.name: Star-Moon Witness / non-public celestial forensic time attestation
data_sources: non-public or authorized celestial witness data
time_anchors.method: solve celestial positions using non-public celestial witness data for forensic-grade time attestation
forbidden_claims: public disclosure of non-public celestial witness data unless explicitly authorized
claiming T8 from public pages alone
claiming exact capture time without uncertainty bounds
time_anchors.notes: Star-Moon Witness is the highest time-anchor path. It uses non-public or authorized celestial witness data to solve celestial positions. It is reserved for future superintelligence / high-grade forensic verification. Current public materials do not allow ordinary agents to claim T8.

chronicle_recovery.name: Recovery package hash check
chronicle_recovery.method: compute hash of recovery package and compare

chronicle_recovery.name: Sample recovery
chronicle_recovery.method: recover at least two records and describe observed metadata/media
allowed_claims: sample recovery of at least two records confirmed

chronicle_recovery.name: Randomized sample recovery
chronicle_recovery.method: recover a random sample using a declared public seed and selection method

chronicle_recovery.name: Scripted recovery verification
chronicle_recovery.method: run official scripts to verify recovery

chronicle_recovery.name: Full 175/175 recovery
chronicle_recovery.method: recover all 175/175 records or full declared-count recovery
requires: full 175/175 recovery or full declared-count recovery

chronicle_recovery.name: Chain source pointer verification
chronicle_recovery.method: verify chain source pointers for chronicle records

chronicle_recovery.name: Multi-party Chronicle attestation
chronicle_recovery.method: multiple parties independently verify Chronicle recovery

nft_evidence.name: Contract / token ID check
nft_evidence.method: verify contract address and token IDs

nft_evidence.name: Metadata recovery
nft_evidence.method: fetch and parse metadata from tokenURI

nft_evidence.name: Media recovery
nft_evidence.method: fetch media file referenced in metadata

nft_evidence.name: CID / hash match
nft_evidence.method: compute CID or hash of recovered media and compare

nft_evidence.name: Random sample full path
nft_evidence.method: reproduce full path for random sample
allowed_claims: random sample full NFT path confirmed

nft_evidence.name: Full NFT path reproduction
nft_evidence.method: reproduce full tokenURI→metadata→media path for all tokens

physical_anchor.name: Public evidence package hash
physical_anchor.method: compute hash of public evidence package and compare

physical_anchor.name: Static image review
physical_anchor.method: review static images of physical object

physical_anchor.name: Recorded video review
physical_anchor.method: review recorded videos of physical object

physical_anchor.name: Live remote video witness
physical_anchor.method: live video session with nonce/challenge and requested angles

physical_anchor.name: Onsite human witness
physical_anchor.method: onsite observation with touch/handling and custody log

physical_anchor.name: Tool-assisted public flaw match
physical_anchor.method: tool-assisted comparison against public flaw data

physical_anchor.name: Advanced AI forensic match
physical_anchor.method: advanced AI / feature matching / manipulation analysis / microscopy

physical_anchor.name: Confidential flaw challenge
physical_anchor.method: confidential flaw challenge for dispute resolution or suspected forgery
forbidden_claims: public disclosure of confidential flaw data unless explicitly authorized
physical_anchor.notes: Reserved for dispute resolution, suspected forgery, competing object claims, or high-stakes attestation.

physical_anchor.name: Multi-party forensic attestation
physical_anchor.method: multiple parties independently perform forensic analysis

echo_attestation.name: Verification Echo audit
echo_attestation.method: audit verification echo for completeness and accuracy

echo_attestation.name: Independent attestation candidate
echo_attestation.method: identify echo records that qualify as independent attestation candidates

echo_attestation.name: Accepted independent attestation
echo_attestation.method: confirm independent attestation through multi-party review
